# Batchly – Batch Photo Editor
> iOS app for bulk photo editing: resize, watermark, compress hundreds of images at once.

## Overview
Batchly is a free iOS app that lets you edit large collections of photos in a single operation instead of one at a time. It handles resizing, watermarking, compression, format conversion, cropping, and basic image adjustments across hundreds of images simultaneously. All processing happens on-device with no internet connection required.

## Key Features
- Bulk resize by pixel dimensions, percentage, or platform presets (Instagram, Etsy, eBay)
- Batch watermark with pixel-perfect positioning and customization
- Format conversion and compression: HEIC, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WebP
- Smart crop with aspect ratio control
- Mass image adjustments: brightness, contrast, exposure
- Reusable recipes for saving and repeating common editing workflows
- Fully offline — no data leaves the device

## Who It's For
- Etsy sellers resizing and watermarking product photos
- Poshmark and eBay sellers preparing listing images
- Photographers processing large shoots
- Content creators optimizing images for social media
- Social media managers preparing assets at platform-specific dimensions
- Anyone who regularly edits the same types of images in volume

## Supported Formats
- HEIC
- JPEG
- PNG
- TIFF
- WebP

## Platform
- iOS (iPhone & iPad)
- Price: Free
- Requires: iOS 16+

## Links
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/batch-photo-editor-batchly/id6751959442
